name: architecture-diagram
description: Generate diagrams from natural language as single-file HTML, SVG, Mermaid, and exportable PNG/PDF.

interface.shortDescription: Generate polished diagrams from natural language
interface.longDescription: Use Architecture Diagram to generate architecture diagrams, flowcharts, mind maps, ER diagrams, and sequence diagrams from natural language, with HTML, SVG, Mermaid, and exportable PNG/PDF outputs.
interface.defaultPrompt: Generate a polished diagram from my natural-language description
